top_signals.title: As Hormuz crisis eases, gas prices may drop—other costs like groceries and home goods could stay high for a while
top_signals.summary: Oil prices are falling after a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but broader relief from higher prices may take time.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
